events.text: Substitution, Korea Republic. Son Heung-Min replaces Hwang Hee-Chan.
Substitution, Korea Republic. Kim Jin-Gyu replaces Paik Seung-Ho.
Substitution, Korea Republic. Jens Castrop replaces Lee Tae-Seok.
Substitution, South Africa. Tshepang Moremi replaces Oswin Appollis.
Goal! South Africa 1, Korea Republic 0. Thapelo Maseko (South Africa) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Tshepang Moremi following a fast break.
Substitution, Korea Republic. Park Jin-Seob replaces Kim Min-Jae.
Aubrey Modiba (South Africa) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Korea Republic. Cho Gue-Sung replaces Oh Hyeon-Gyu.
Substitution, South Africa. Iqraam Rayners replaces Thapelo Maseko.
Cho Gue-Sung (Korea Republic) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, South Africa. Jayden Adams replaces Relebohile Mofokeng.
